default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly pipeline review and discussion of sales process improvements](https://fathom.video/share/N3SiUKx9PjZwyvyiAG3cDtdCZFt3JSvD?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Pipeline cleanup needed: Remove old/low-confidence deals, update stages accurately](https://fathom.video/share/N3SiUKx9PjZwyvyiAG3cDtdCZFt3JSvD?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
  - [New proposal template to be created: Simpler, non-legal version before formal contract](https://fathom.video/share/N3SiUKx9PjZwyvyiAG3cDtdCZFt3JSvD?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
  - [Redefine deal stages: Align with customer actions, not just internal processes](https://fathom.video/share/N3SiUKx9PjZwyvyiAG3cDtdCZFt3JSvD?tab=summary&timestamp=581.0)
  - [Separate close date (forecasting) from kickoff date (delivery planning)](https://fathom.video/share/N3SiUKx9PjZwyvyiAG3cDtdCZFt3JSvD?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

## Topics

### Pipeline Status and Cleanup

  - [6 kickoffs planned for June, but 20+ deals listed](https://fathom.video/share/N3SiUKx9PjZwyvyiAG3cDtdCZFt3JSvD?tab=summary&timestamp=220.0)
  - [Many deals in "Proposal" stage inaccurately; need to refine stages](https://fathom.video/share/N3SiUKx9PjZwyvyiAG3cDtdCZFt3JSvD?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
  - [Team to clean up pipeline, push realistic deals to June, others to July](https://fathom.video/share/N3SiUKx9PjZwyvyiAG3cDtdCZFt3JSvD?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Aim for 10 potential June closes, expecting 7-8 to actually close](https://fathom.video/share/N3SiUKx9PjZwyvyiAG3cDtdCZFt3JSvD?tab=summary&timestamp=712.0)

### Sales Process Improvements

  - [Current issue: Sending full legal contracts too early creates friction](https://fathom.video/share/N3SiUKx9PjZwyvyiAG3cDtdCZFt3JSvD?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [New approach: Create simplified proposal template without legal terms](https://fathom.video/share/N3SiUKx9PjZwyvyiAG3cDtdCZFt3JSvD?tab=summary&timestamp=2104.0)
  - [Proposal to include deliverables, pricing, and high-level terms](https://fathom.video/share/N3SiUKx9PjZwyvyiAG3cDtdCZFt3JSvD?tab=summary&timestamp=2196.0)
  - [Full contract to be sent only after proposal agreement](https://fathom.video/share/N3SiUKx9PjZwyvyiAG3cDtdCZFt3JSvD?tab=summary&timestamp=2242.0)

### Deal Stage Definitions

  - [Current stages don't accurately reflect deal progress](https://fathom.video/share/N3SiUKx9PjZwyvyiAG3cDtdCZFt3JSvD?tab=summary&timestamp=1382.0)
  - [Need to redefine stages based on customer actions, not just internal steps](https://fathom.video/share/N3SiUKx9PjZwyvyiAG3cDtdCZFt3JSvD?tab=summary&timestamp=581.0)
  - [Aim to create more accurate forecasting and pipeline visibility](https://fathom.video/share/N3SiUKx9PjZwyvyiAG3cDtdCZFt3JSvD?tab=summary&timestamp=1741.0)

### CRM Transition

  - [Planning to switch to HubSpot in about two weeks](https://fathom.video/share/N3SiUKx9PjZwyvyiAG3cDtdCZFt3JSvD?tab=summary&timestamp=1480.0)
  - [Opportunity to redefine deal stages and pipeline management process](https://fathom.video/share/N3SiUKx9PjZwyvyiAG3cDtdCZFt3JSvD?tab=summary&timestamp=1672.0)

### Recent Wins and Ongoing Deals

  - [3 new customers closed this week](https://fathom.video/share/N3SiUKx9PjZwyvyiAG3cDtdCZFt3JSvD?tab=summary&timestamp=265.0)
  - [High-priority deals: Diligent, Hashira, Reddit (potential custom arrangement)](https://fathom.video/share/N3SiUKx9PjZwyvyiAG3cDtdCZFt3JSvD?tab=summary&timestamp=470.0)

### Team Coordination

  - [Marcel (CEO) to potentially engage directly with some deals (e.g., Hashira)](https://fathom.video/share/N3SiUKx9PjZwyvyiAG3cDtdCZFt3JSvD?tab=summary&timestamp=733.0)
  - [Need to balance kickoff scheduling to maintain 4-6 week pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/N3SiUKx9PjZwyvyiAG3cDtdCZFt3JSvD?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Clean up pipeline by next Friday, removing old/low-confidence deals](https://fathom.video/share/N3SiUKx9PjZwyvyiAG3cDtdCZFt3JSvD?tab=summary&timestamp=1836.0)
  - [Create new, simplified proposal template (non-legal) by next week](https://fathom.video/share/N3SiUKx9PjZwyvyiAG3cDtdCZFt3JSvD?tab=summary&timestamp=2295.0)
  - [Redefine deal stages to align with customer actions and improve forecasting](https://fathom.video/share/N3SiUKx9PjZwyvyiAG3cDtdCZFt3JSvD?tab=summary&timestamp=1664.0)
  - [Separate and clarify use of close dates (for forecasting) and kickoff dates (for delivery planning)](https://fathom.video/share/N3SiUKx9PjZwyvyiAG3cDtdCZFt3JSvD?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Follow up on high-priority deals (Metronome, Hashira, Reddit)](https://fathom.video/share/N3SiUKx9PjZwyvyiAG3cDtdCZFt3JSvD?tab=summary&timestamp=798.0)
  - [Prepare for transition to HubSpot CRM in \~2 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/N3SiUKx9PjZwyvyiAG3cDtdCZFt3JSvD?tab=summary&timestamp=1480.0)
